name: authoritative-progression-hud
description: Verify depth, quest, next-world, rank, score, and leaderboard widgets share authoritative server state and retain icon-safe bounds for long values.

args.code: local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation c:Invoke('Reset') c:Invoke('SetStats',{DailyQuestDate=os.date('!%Y-%m-%d')}) c:Invoke('SetStats',{Power=9876543210123,Coins=456789012345,Depth=37,Score=9876543210,WallLevel=12,DailyBreaks=9,TutorialStep=3}) local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] p:LoadCharacter() return true

steps.label: set long authoritative values and respawn

args.code: local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local g=game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD local h=g.PixelPerfectHeroCityHUD local p=h.PowerCard.PowerValue local c=h.CoinsCard.CoinsValue local d=h.WallCard.DepthValue local function effectiveVisible(item) local node=item while node and node~=g do if node:IsA('GuiObject') and not node.Visible then return false end node=node.Parent end return true end local visibleWallLevel=0 for _,item in ipairs(g:GetDescendants()) do if item:IsA('TextLabel') and effectiveVisible(item) and string.find(string.upper(item.Text),'WALL LV',1,true) then visibleWallLevel+=1 end end local function safe(label,card,limit) local right=(label.AbsolutePosition.X+label.AbsoluteSize.X-card.AbsolutePosition.X)/math.max(1,card.AbsoluteSize.X) return label.TextFits and right<=limit end local rank=h.DepthRankHUD local marker=rank:FindFirstChild('HeroDepthMarker1', true) local leaderText=marker and marker:FindFirstChild('HeroName') and marker.HeroName.Text or '' local valid=h.Visible and h.WallCard.DepthLabel.Text=='DEPTH' and d.Text=='37' and h:GetAttribute('AuthoritativeDepth')==37 and h:GetAttribute('AuthoritativeQuestBreaks')==9 and math.abs((h:GetAttribute('AuthoritativeWorldProgress') or 0)-37/75)<.001 and h.QuestCard.QuestProgress.Text=='9 / 10' and string.find(h.NextWorldCard.WorldProgress.Text,'D37/75',1,true)~=nil and string.find(rank.RankStats.Text,'DEPTH 37',1,true)~=nil and string.find(rank.RankStats.Text,'SCORE',1,true)~=nil and string.find(leaderText,'D37',1,true)~=nil and safe(p,h.PowerCard,.76) and safe(c,h.CoinsCard,.75) and safe(d,h.WallCard,.83) and visibleWallLevel==0 return H:JSONEncode({power=p.Text,coins=c.Text,depth=d.Text,depthLabel=h.WallCard.DepthLabel.Text,quest=h.QuestCard.QuestProgress.Text,world=h.NextWorldCard.WorldProgress.Text,rank=rank.RankStats.Text,leader=leaderText,powerFits=p.TextFits,coinsFits=c.TextFits,depthFits=d.TextFits,visibleWallLevel=visibleWallLevel,valid=valid})

steps.label: long values remain authoritative and icon safe

args.code: local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation c:Invoke('Reset') c:Invoke('SetStats',{DailyQuestDate=os.date('!%Y-%m-%d')}) c:Invoke('SetStats',{Power=15,WallLevel=1,CritChance=0,FistMultiplier=1,PetMultiplier=0}) local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] local r=p.Character.HumanoidRootPart r.CFrame=CFrame.lookAt(Vector3.new(-2,3,-20),Vector3.new(-2,3,-200)) r.AssemblyLinearVelocity=Vector3.zero local result=c:Invoke('PunchRadius') p:SetAttribute('HUDTestDepth',result.Depth or p.leaderstats.Depth.Value) p:SetAttribute('HUDTestBreaks',result.DailyBreaks or p.RPGStats.DailyBreaks.Value) p:SetAttribute('HUDTestScore',result.Score or p.leaderstats.Score.Value) return H:JSONEncode({ok=result.ok,broken=result.brokenCount,depth=p:GetAttribute('HUDTestDepth'),breaks=p:GetAttribute('HUDTestBreaks'),score=p:GetAttribute('HUDTestScore')})

local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local p=game.Players.LocalPlayer local h=p.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD.PixelPerfectHeroCityHUD local depth=p:GetAttribute('HUDTestDepth') or 0 local breaks=p:GetAttribute('HUDTestBreaks') or 0 local shown=math.min(breaks,10) local score=p:GetAttribute('HUDTestScore') or 0 local rank=h.DepthRankHUD local marker=rank:FindFirstChild('HeroDepthMarker1', true) local leaderText=marker and marker:FindFirstChild('HeroName') and marker.HeroName.Text or '' local ratio=h:GetAttribute('AuthoritativeWorldProgress') or -1 local valid=h:GetAttribute('AuthoritativeDepth')==depth and h:GetAttribute('AuthoritativeQuestBreaks')==shown and h.WallCard.DepthValue.Text==tostring(depth) and h.QuestCard.QuestProgress.Text==string.format('%d / 10',shown) and math.abs(ratio-depth/75)<.001 and string.find(h.NextWorldCard.WorldProgress.Text,string.format('D%d/75',depth),1,true)~=nil and string.find(rank.RankStats.Text,string.format('DEPTH %d',depth),1,true)~=nil and string.find(leaderText,p.DisplayName,1,true)~=nil and string.find(leaderText,string.format('D%d',depth),1,true)~=nil return H:JSONEncode({depth=depth,breaks=breaks,shown=shown,score=score,depthText=h.WallCard.DepthValue.Text,quest=h.QuestCard.QuestProgress.Text,world=h.NextWorldCard.WorldProgress.Text,rank=rank.RankStats.Text,leader=leaderText,valid=valid})

steps.label: real break updates all progression widgets together
